title: EagleWiz 3 Tealights Candle Holder Plate Crystal Affect Crushed Mirror Diamante Home tea light holder
features: Ideal for bedrooms and living rooms
description: Product Description Crystal Diamante Tea Lights Holder Triple Diamante Crush Crystal Tea Light Holder Elevate your home décor with the mesmerizing sparkle of our exclusive Diamond Crush Tea Light Holder. Designed for those who love modern glamour, this piece instantly transforms any room into a sanctuary of light and luxury. The perfect centerpiece for your coffee table, mantle, or window sill. Mesmerizing Sparkle: Hundreds of tiny crushed crystals reflect light beautifully. Triple Candle Capacity: Holds three standard tea lights for maximum ambient glow. Versatile Elegance: Perfect for living rooms, guest rooms, or special events. Durable Mirror Base: Built on a sturdy, easy-to-clean glass base. Unmatched Quality & Brilliant Craftsmanship Every detail matters. Our tea light holders feature diamond-cut crystal cups set upon a bed of shimmering crushed diamond glitter . Unlike cheap imitations, our product is designed for clarity and maximum light dispersion, ensuring a spectacular, firework-like sparkle when lit. We don't just sell décor; we sell dazzle. Where Will You Place Your Sparkle? The versatility of this piece allows it to seamlessly integrate with any style, from contemporary chic to classic glamour. Place it where you need a touch of radiant warmth: on a bedside table to welcome guests, in a living room window to catch the sunset, or as the stunning focal point for a romantic dinner.
